skills.name: shopify-gmc-misrepresentation-auditor
skills.title: Shopify GMC Misrepresentation Auditor
skills.title_zh: Shopify GMC 虚假陈述审计工具
skills.description: Crawl any live Shopify store and audit for Google Merchant Center Misrepresentation policy risks. No API token required — simulates how Google's crawler sees your store. Produces a prioritized HTML report with evidence, a Manual Checklist for items that require merchant verification, and a staged remediation plan.
skills.description_zh: 无需 API 授权，直接爬取真实上线的 Shopify 店铺，模拟 GMC 爬虫视角，检测 Misrepresentation 政策风险。输出带证据的优先级 HTML 报告、需要商家手动核查的 Checklist，以及分阶段修复计划。
features: Two-phase audit: store-level identity/policy/pricing checks + product-level deep crawl
Parses all JSON-LD schema blocks including review app blocks
Manual Checklist (MC-01 to MC-07) for items that cannot be verified by crawling
Systemic pattern detection across sampled products
Single-file HTML report with risk score, evidence, and staged remediation plan
features_zh: 两阶段审计：店铺级身份/政策/定价检查 + 产品级深度爬取
解析所有 JSON-LD schema 块，包括评论应用生成的块
手动核查清单（MC-01 至 MC-07），涵盖爬取无法验证的项目
跨采样产品的系统性问题模式检测
单文件 HTML 报告，含风险评分、证据和分阶段修复计划
